summary: Disk Analysis gets a dedicated Schedule tab with customizable multi-scan timers, schedule recommendations on first scan, and a scanning splash icon.
introduced: Schedule tab — move scan automation out of History into Disk Analysis → Schedule with per-entry time, weekday, and frequency controls
Multiple schedules — add extra fast or deep scan entries per drive and run all enabled schedules in sequence
First-scan schedule prompt — when no schedule is enabled, Overview and the scan chooser show recommended timing beside Fast Scan and Deep Scan
changed: History tab — shows scan snapshots only; scheduling moved to Schedule
Startup splash — uses the scanning dock icon with a subtle pulse instead of a separate loading spinner
